_readme: Curated REAL-CARD behavior scripts for cards whose test fixture lives under a different name (or that need no fixture). deck:triage merges these over fixture-derived scripts when emitting the copy-paste Scripts section. Keys are exact card names (case-insensitive match). Grows deck by deck.

modes.label: Exile top two; play until end of your next turn
Create a token copy of target permanent (a 4/4 with flying)
Draw cards equal to the greatest mana value among permanents you control
Destroy target artifact that opponent controls
Deal 4 damage to each other opponent
Exile the top card of your library; you may play it
Draw cards equal to the greatest power among non-Human creatures you control
Non-Human creatures you control get +3/+3 until end of turn
Breya deals 3 damage to target player
Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn

loyalty_abilities.label: Discard up to two cards, then draw that many
Sacrifice an artifact, return one from your graveyard
